nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Template of runtime environment variables (PIPELINE_* prefix) documenting the pandoc format, embedding model/provider, chunk size, vector-store backend, Chroma persist dir, and collection name used to configure PipelineConfig.
nodes.languageNotes: Loaded via pydantic-settings as PipelineConfig; every key uses the PIPELINE_ prefix except ANONYMIZED_TELEMETRY (Chroma).

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Project guidance for Claude Code covering commands, the two-flow architecture (indexing/search pipeline and HTML→GitLab-MD converter), module boundaries, known pitfalls, configuration, embedding providers, and vector-store backends.
nodes.languageNotes: Authoritative architecture reference with per-module role tables and guardrails enforcing module separation.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Primary project documentation: quick start, workspace contract, full CLI reference (index/search/convert/export/scan/lint/check), pipeline stages, embedding providers, vector-store backends, environment setup, and Python API examples.

nodes.name: devfile.yaml
nodes.summary: Eclipse Che / OpenShift Dev Spaces devfile defining the remote development container, components, and named run-task commands for building and exercising the pipeline.
nodes.languageNotes: Devfile v2 schema: components provision the workspace container; commands surface as Command Palette run tasks.

nodes.name: environment.yml
nodes.summary: Conda/micromamba environment specification pinning the Python version, channels, and dependencies needed to run the pipeline (including pandoc) on Windows.

nodes.name: pyproject.toml
nodes.summary: Python package definition and tooling config: dependencies, optional extras (dev/chroma/azure/tui), the sdd-pipeline console script entry point, plus pytest, coverage, ruff, and mypy settings.
nodes.languageNotes: setuptools build backend; pytest sets pythonpath=src so imports resolve without install; ruff line-length 100 / py311 target; coverage gate fail_under=70.
